batches.description: Independent discovery/setup - Brain mesh acquisition, particle system foundation, test data generation
Parallel algorithm work - OBJ loading, vertex analysis, concept hashing
Component implementation - Collision resolution, overflow system, state management
batches.notes: Sessions 5,6 require Session 4 completion; Session 10 requires Sessions 7,9

batches.description: Integration and polish - Camera controls, performance baseline, integration testing, demo prep
batches.notes: Sequential execution required for proper validation flow

risks.brain_mesh_source: github.com/iamwallam/3dbrain may be unavailable - fallback to procedural generation
risks.sdk_schema_mismatch: Need adapter layer for data transformation between expected and actual memory schema
risks.performance_bottlenecks: GPU performance cannot be validated without runtime - may need optimization iterations
risks.three_js_compatibility: Version pinning to 0.176.0 may cause conflicts with existing dependencies

optimization_opportunities.batch_efficiency: Batch 1-3 can run in parallel if dependencies are met
optimization_opportunities.critical_path: Session 1 → Session 2 → Session 3 → Session 4 → Sessions 5,6 → Integration
optimization_opportunities.resource_utilization: Multiple sessions can share brain mesh analysis and test data
